title: Mellend Optimization
description: The project is focused on developing an optimized Minecraft build with an emphasis on performance, stability, visual appeal, and maximum compatibility with each version.
body:
### **High performance**
The build is designed for the fastest and smoothest gameplay possible thanks to modern optimization mods such as Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, and others. They have been carefully selected to ensure stability, high FPS, and no lag on most devices — without compromising gameplay.

### **Support for visual enhancements**
The build is compatible with resource packs and shaders, including support for connected textures and scaling. Even packs that require OptiFine often work without any problems.

### **Familiar Minecraft**
The build retains the classic interface and controls, including an expanded achievements window, gamepad support, and other familiar elements.

### **Versatility**
No content mods — suitable for any world and scenario. Can be used as a basis for adding your favorite mods.

### **Quick updates**
The build is quickly updated to new versions of Minecraft, and mod settings are preserved when switching to new builds.

### **Lightweight and expandable**
Built on Fabric — a lightweight and fast platform that supports broad compatibility with optimization and visual mods.
